core_modules.description: Central orchestration module for training/search/ensemble lifecycle, backend interaction, and model management.
Primary user-facing sklearn-compatible estimators; best MCP integration entrypoint for fit/predict/score workflows.
Metric/scoring abstraction used by evaluation and search objective configuration.
Input feature validation and type handling before model search/execution.
Target validation/encoding layer for classification and regression tasks.
Builds ensembles from candidate runs; core post-search performance module.
Implements ensemble selection algorithm used for final model composition.
SMBO optimization backend coordinating configuration search and evaluation.
Pipeline construction for classification components and configuration spaces.
Pipeline construction for regression components and configuration spaces.

cli_commands.name: No stable end-user CLI entrypoint identified
cli_commands.description: Repository is primarily library-first; executable scripts in source/scripts are research/utility workflows, not packaged CLI commands.

cli_commands.name: example_parallel_manual_spawning_cli.py
cli_commands.description: Example script for manual parallel search spawning; suitable only as reference, not production CLI API.
